problem_statement: Design a bounded, reproducible evaluation for sensor anomaly detection.
scope: Offline, small-scale evaluation of sensor anomaly detection; no production deployment.
research_questions: Which evidence supports the evaluation design for sensor anomaly detection?
Which controlled comparison isolates the main failure mode?

evidence_gaps.description: Verifiable evidence for sensor anomaly detection.
A controlled evaluation using event F1.

search_queries.query: sensor anomaly detection controlled comparison event F1

success_criteria: All claims bind to accepted evidence
The primary metric is event F1
risks: Small samples may produce unstable estimates
